gas_form.title: Gas Form
gas_form.description: The user sublimates into a cloud of gas.

golden_carrot.title: Regeneration Aura
golden_carrot.description: Eat a golden carrot before crouching in gas form to release regeneration around you.

cake.title: Speed Aura
cake.description: Eat a cake before crouching in gas form to release speed around you.

melon.title: Strength Aura
melon.description: Eat a melon slice before crouching in gas form to release strength around you.

glow_berries.title: Blindness Aura
glow_berries.description: Eat a glow berry before crouching in gas form to release blindness around you.

potato.title: Nausea Aura
potato.description: Eat a potato before crouching in gas form to release nausea around you.

rotten_flesh.title: Poison Aura
rotten_flesh.description: Eat rotten flesh before crouching in gas form to release poison around you.

set_name_description.power_description: The user is able to transform their whole body into a gas

entity_data.CommandOnEntityHit: execute as @e[distance=0..5, type=!palladium:custom_projectile, limit=1, type=!minecraft:item, type=!minecraft:arrow, tag=!smoke_flinger, sort=nearest] run effect give @s minecraft:instant_health 1 0 true
execute as @e[distance=0..5, type=!palladium:custom_projectile, limit=1, type=!minecraft:item, type=!minecraft:arrow, tag=!smoke_flinger, sort=nearest] run effect give @s minecraft:speed 5 0 true
execute as @e[distance=0..5, type=!palladium:custom_projectile, limit=1, type=!minecraft:item, type=!minecraft:arrow, tag=!smoke_flinger, sort=nearest] run effect give @s minecraft:strength 5 0 true
execute as @e[distance=0..5, type=!palladium:custom_projectile, limit=1, type=!minecraft:item, type=!minecraft:arrow, tag=!smoke_flinger, sort=nearest] run effect give @s minecraft:blindness 5 0 true
execute as @e[distance=0..5, type=!palladium:custom_projectile, limit=1, type=!minecraft:item, type=!minecraft:arrow, tag=!smoke_flinger, sort=nearest] run effect give @s minecraft:hunger 5 0 true
execute as @e[distance=0..5, type=!palladium:custom_projectile, limit=1, type=!minecraft:item, type=!minecraft:arrow, tag=!smoke_flinger, sort=nearest] run effect give @s minecraft:poison 5 0 true

execute as @e[distance=0..5, type=!palladium:custom_projectile, limit=1, type=!minecraft:item, type=!minecraft:arrow, tag=!smoke_flinger, sort=nearest] at @s run function airline_heroes:vapor_kick_hit
